themeSelector.title: Choose a Website Look for Client Review
themeSelector.subtitle: All 3 options use the same content and portfolio, but each gives the brand a different personality so clients can choose the direction that helps close the sale.

theme1.title: Theme 1 — Trust & Clean
theme1.description: KKD's core look: clean, approachable, and easy to read. A stable company-site baseline for clients who want a dependable impression.
theme1.concept: A solar website focused on trust, clarity, and moving clients directly toward requesting a quote.
theme1.bestFor: Residential buyers and SMEs who want a professional site that does not feel too heavy or complex.

theme2.title: Theme 2 — Premium Signature
theme2.description: Keeps the main browsing experience intact, then finishes with a black-gold footer for a heavier, more premium brand impression.
theme2.concept: Use black and gold as the website's closing signature, making the brand feel more established without changing the main flow.
theme2.bestFor: Clients who prefer a premium, calm, polished look that elevates the current design.

theme3.title: Theme 3 — Commercial Energy
theme3.description: A commercial-sales direction using a dark blue hero, orange accents, and a proof panel so the site feels closer to a proposal for business clients.
theme3.concept: Turn the home page into a business solar sales flow, emphasizing site survey, real references, and ROI-driven decision making.
theme3.bestFor: Hospitals, commercial buildings, factories, and buyers who need technical confidence before deciding.

theme4.title: Theme 4 — Blue-Orange × Midnight Footer
theme4.description: Theme 3's commercial-sales look throughout the site, closing with the premium black-gold footer from Theme 2 for a heavier finish.
theme4.concept: Combine Theme 3's business solar sales flow with Theme 2's black-gold footer signature, so the site stays technical and confident but ends on a more premium note.
theme4.bestFor: Clients who want Theme 3's commercial energy but with a more premium, established closing impression.
theme4.mood: Confident, engineering-led, and premium at the finish.

faq.title: Have Questions About Solar?
faq.intro: Answers to the questions we hear most from customers about solar installation. Still have questions? Chat with our team on LINE.
faq.q1: How much will solar reduce my electricity bill?
faq.a1: It depends on your system size and usage. For example, a home with a bill of ฿1,500-3,000/month can cut its bill by up to 60% per month with a 5KW system.
faq.q2: How long does on-site installation take?
faq.a2: Most on-site installations take just 1-2 days, depending on system size and roof type. Our safety-trained installation team controls quality at every step.
faq.a3: On-grid systems pay back the fastest — typically around 4-6 years for smaller systems, and somewhat longer for larger systems, depending on your bill and usage pattern.
faq.a4: The Tier 1 solar panels we install come with a 25-year panel warranty, installed by licensed engineers, so you can be confident in safety and quality at every step.
faq.q5: Do I need to apply for permits myself? Who handles the paperwork?
faq.a5: Our licensed engineering team handles design and installation end-to-end, and will guide you through any related paperwork so you can feel at ease throughout the process.
